summary: group_session.py 已在本地、远端 bind-source、容器内 exact match。api 重启后 /api/v1/health 正常，target group 协议已是 manager-only 目标值，但 target group session 虽已切到 bootstrap-manager-only-workflow-v1 和 current_stage=step1，gate_snapshot 仍保留 step0.ready，因此 session 仍在反映旧 session 基线事实。
blocker: Target group session still retains legacy gate_snapshot baseline (step0.ready=true) after protocol/workflow switch, so step0 is not yet a clean bootstrap start state.
